name: AANA Guardrail Pack
description: A no-code OpenClaw plugin that bundles core instruction-only AANA guardrail skills for workflow readiness, scope, tool use, privacy, files, sends, publishing, evidence, code review, and decision logging.

mode.description: How strongly host agents should treat AANA guardrail outputs.

log_decisions.description: Whether host agents should create compact redacted decision notes when appropriate.

require_explicit_approval_for_external_a.description: Require explicit user approval before sends, publishes, exports, file changes, bookings, purchases, or other external state changes.
